story.title: The Story
story.subtitle: Born in 2024
story.description:
Opened in September 2024, Dilietta was born from a simple desire: to bring Michele Farnesi's cuisine to everyday life, in a more accessible, generous and spontaneous version. An address designed for the neighborhood, to visit often, at any time, without any special occasion.

You'll find the essence of Michele's cuisine through a wide selection of antipasti that evolve with the seasons, fresh pasta made on site, a beautiful selection of homemade sweets, and exceptional Italian charcuterie from Osvaldo. The menu is complemented by numerous Italian grocery products, sourced directly by the chef from producers.

Dilietta is lively, everyday and joyful Italian cuisine — the kind you love to come back to, again and again.

menu.title: The Menu
menu.subtitle: Antipasti, pasta & dishes
menu.description:
Every day at lunchtime, Dilietta offers a lunch set menu with pizza fritta or stuffed focaccia, ideal for a quick and gourmet meal.

Among the house favorites: lasagna, maritozzi, homemade focaccia and cicchetti, which have become signatures.

products.title: Products
products.subtitle: Italian grocery
products.description: A curated selection of Italian products: olive oils, vinegars, dried pasta, preserves, charcuterie and cheeses from producers we know.

suppliers.title: Suppliers
suppliers.subtitle: Our producers
suppliers.description: We work directly with passionate Italian producers, selected for the quality of their products and their commitment.

catering.title: Catering
catering.subtitle: Events & receptions
catering.description: Beyond the table, Dilietta also accompanies your events and moments of sharing through catering services: corporate meetings, weddings, private or professional events, always with the same demand for taste and generosity.
